title: OpenAI GPT-5.1 Codex Max and Codex Mini now available as Databricks-hosted models
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI [GPT-5.1 Codex Max](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-1-codex-max) and [GPT-5.1 Codex Mini](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-1-codex-mini) as Databricks-hosted models. These code-specialized models excel at code generation, refactoring, and software engineering tasks. You can access these models using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with the terms of OpenAI's [Acceptable Use Policy](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
